title: Galt Dino Lab -Explore and Discover Science,Craft and Fossil Digging Kit for Kids - STEM Childrens Dinosaur Toys for Boys and Girls - Lab Book, 3 Fun Experiments, Stickers and More - Ages 5 Years Plus
features: ENGAGING STEM LEARNING: Nurture early STEM skills and scientific thinking with this hands-on Explore and Discover Dino Lab Science Kit with 3 fun experiments for an immersive learning experience
COMPREHENSIVE KIT: With dig out dino fossil excavation stone, excavation tools, play goggles, amber slime with dinosaur, air-drying clay, dinosaur tracks mould, stickers and 16-page lab booklet
EXCITING EXPERIMENTS: Explore this science kit for kids and dig up a dinosaur fossil, experiment with amber slime, make your own dinosaur tracks and discover more about these prehistoric creatures

AWARD-WINNING SCIENCE: The Explore and Discover range is Good Toy Guide Recommended and winner of the Best Preschool STEM Range for 2019, Ensure quality and educational value for your little scientist
EDUCATIONAL FUN FOR AGES 5 AND UP: Tailored for children aged 5 years and upwards, this science kit aligns with the National Curriculum, ensuring a valuable and age-appropriate learning experience
description: From the manufacturer Galt Toys, Explore and Discover Science Kit Range Delve into the wonderful world of science for children with the Explore and Discover range from Galt. Each fun-packed science kit contains an assortment of exciting experiments, ideal for engaging the imagination and encouraging early STEM learning in young scientists. Your budding professors will be introduced to the inspiring world of science, with plenty of support material so the whole family can learn together, including full-colour guides and quality components to enlighten and entertain from the moment you open the box. Our Explore and Discover science sets are suitable for ages 5 years +, are compatible with the National Curriculum, recommended by the Good Toy Guide, and were also winners of the Best Preschool STEM Range for 2019. Fiercely Fun Young Science Set Take a Jurassic Journey with Science Kits for Kids Featuring 3 exciting experiments, the Dino Lab lets young scientists explore our prehistoric planet and discover the dinosaurs that used to roam the Earth. Engage even the most active imaginations and promote creative problem solving as they learn to dig up a dinosaur fossil, experiment with amber slime and create dinosaur tracks! Fun-Filled First Science Toys Dino Lab is an ideal first kids’ science kit for intrepid minds! Simply follow your 16-page full colour Lab Booklet for clear step by step guides to each of the enriching experiments, and let the fun, hands on learning start right away! Science for Kids Has Never Been So Much Fun Our children’s science kits feature plenty of space for your young scientists to take notes and record all their predictions and results, while answering tricky questions from trusty lab assistant Teccy the Robot. Watch their confidence grow as they work through each of the science experiments and put their new Galt lab knowledge to the test!
